allow: Bash(echo "=== Local の mysql socket ==="; find "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local" -name "mysqld.sock" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== Local の mysql クライアント ==="; ls /Applications/Local.app/Contents/Resources/extraResources/lightning-services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i mysql; find "/Applications/Local.app/Contents/Resources/extraResources/lightning-services" -name "mysql" -type f 2>/dev/null | head)
Bash(grep -nE "^#{1,3} |Chapter|ch[0-9]|^### 9-|^## 9|第9|9章" 講座用テキスト.md)
